title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Ulti, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Sanji, Unknown person #7 as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Perhaps I should sprinkle some reptilian Pesticide!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: She's the one that did it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: To finish off all of you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But it doesn't matter either way!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Your words don't match your actions!!

dialogue.speaker: Ulti
dialogue.text: »How dare you do that to pay-pay!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Im counting on you, USOPP! Protect my beloved:) Nam-san!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: to where kin'emon and the others are!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A...PapaPAPA!! You've learned from last time

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, can you even fight with your ears closed...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a pitiful state you guys are in!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ALL TEN OF YOU GUYS HAVE DESTROYED AN IMPRESSIVE AMOUNT OF TOWNS TILL NOW!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To think you guys were beaten to a pulp because you were wasted from the feast. I can't even bring myself to laugh at this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What happens when an ancient giant seriously goes on a rampage?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll show that to you first hand--?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's this? Is that guy controlling them!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's using his comrade as a weapon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy, don't stop!! There'll be no end to them if you do!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are 10 of "7WHAT"!? I don't have enough cola....!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 49 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
